data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the final completion certificate.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the existence of a 'Final completion certificate' as part of the saga lifecycle. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the implementation or retrieval of this certificate. The linked use case mentions the final completion certificate but lacks concrete evidence of its functionality or validation, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for retrieving or validating the final completion certificate.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and retrieval of the final completion certificate.
